displayTitle: The Building Becomes an Explosives Operation
kicker: RAD SAFETY // HANDLE · STORE · SHIP · LICENSE

beats.narration: Neutron radiography sees inside loaded ordnance. So real explosive devices arrive by the case — and the law treats your building as an explosives operation.

payload.title: AN EXPLOSIVES OPERATION
payload.sub: See inside the device. Answer to three regulators.

beats.narration: Three rulebooks govern at once. ATF decides who may possess and how to store. DOT controls how it moves. Your state layers permits on top.
Storage anchors it all. Anything not in use sits in a locked ATF magazine — five types matched to contents, detonators always in their own.
Until paperwork proves otherwise, every unit is handled as live. Receiving counts exactly and magazines the same day. Theft or loss reaches ATF within twenty-four hours.
Federal license, cleared possessors, records that catch a loss. The image is the easy part. The chain of custody is the job.

payload.sub: Federal license, cleared possessors, records that never go quiet.
